title: Black Chip Bounty | Dakota Poker Tour
text: Black Chip Bounty | Dakota Poker Tour Events Upcoming Events Past Events Calendar News Videos Venues Leaderboard Players Champions Join/Login Live Updates Join/Login Poker Brat Black Chip BOUNTY Tournament Black Chip Bounty Pre-Registration Details Poker Brat Black Chip BOUNTY Tournament | Black Chip Bounty Buy In * $ Chips Count * Add Rebuy/Add-on? Yes No Rebuys 100 $ How Many Addons? * Select How Many Addons 1 Total Addon BuyIn $ Total Addon Chips Count Total Buy In $ Total Chips Count Dealer Appreciation Fee $ Cancel Pre-Register Tournament Info Live Updates Results Payouts Date Jun 07, 2026 11:00 AM Buy In $200 Total Chips 3,820,000 Avg. Chips 3,820,000 Prize Pool $23,880 Registered Players 97 Description The Windbreak will feature a 1-day Bounty Tournament! Single Day Event Registration opens at 11am, cards will be in the air at NOON! Buy-in is $200 (20,000 chips). One-time add-on for $100 (20,000 chips) is available until registration closes. (must have chips to add on) For each player you take out, you earn a $100 bounty! Late registration, & add-ons are open through dinner break. (Approximately 4:30 pm) Suggested Dealer appreciation $20 - Tips are appreciated but not mandatory to play Rules *Late entries will receive a full stack. *Ante is posted by the player in the Big Blind only. *If a player does not have enough chips to cover both the BB and Ante the B.B. is posted first, then any remaining chips to the Ante. *Final table will redraw for seats and sit 9-handed. *Blind structure is subject to change at the Tournament Director's discretion. *Blinds are subject to reaching a blind cap. *DPT follows WSOP rulings *Top 10% + 1 additional placed paid based on unique entries ♠️🏆 Congratulations to Bob Barker of Perham MN the Black Chip Bounty Champion🏆♠️ Jun 07, 2026 11:13 PM What an incredible day of poker at the Black Chip Bounty Tournament!
